payload.answer: I can’t rewrite the memory without knowing which existing memory “the other one” refers to and what it should be rewritten to say.
repair_options: Clarify the target memory to rewrite, then provide the exact replacement text.
Treat “He prefers the other one” as a new separate memory instead of rewriting an existing one.
